themes.title: Notification Delivery Improvements
themes.description: Enhancing the reliability and efficiency of notification delivery.

themes.title: User Experience Enhancements
themes.description: Improving user interaction with notification settings and preferences.

themes.title: Advanced Notification Features
themes.description: Implementing machine learning and optimization techniques for notifications.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the foundational features for notification priority and delivery.
milestones.success_criteria: All MVP features are implemented and tested with a success rate of 95%.

milestones.name: V1 Completion
milestones.description: Implement user preferences and advanced notification features.
milestones.success_criteria: V1 features are live with user satisfaction ratings above 80%.

milestones.name: V2 Completion
milestones.description: Conduct experiments and optimizations for notification content.
milestones.success_criteria: Experiment results show a 20% improvement in user engagement with notifications.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful implementation of MVP features.
V2 features require the completion of V1 features to build upon user feedback.

mvp.goal: Establish core notification functionalities and ensure reliable delivery.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience and introduce advanced notification features.

v2.goal: Optimize notification content and conduct experiments for further improvements.
